title: eurya oblonga var. oblonga
intro: Eurya oblonga var. oblonga, a variant of the Eurya oblonga plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphyllaceae. It is commonly known as the Chinese rowan or oblonga eurya. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eurya oblonga var. oblonga include lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions.
